message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on wednesday
The train should arrive by 10:00 and should depart from peterborough
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the east and should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 20:00 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 19:00
Make sure you get the reference number
